title: Armor Is Better
description: This mod adds 14 armor enchants, mainly around combat, defense, utility, a meta amplifier, and a curse, ARMOR IS BETTER!
body:
**--Armor Is Better--**

- Adds 14 custom armor enchants and a new base armor mechanic to Minecraft 26.1.2 Fabric

**--Base Feature--**

- Every armor piece has a chance to fully deflect mob damage based on material tier (leather 2% → netherite 12% per piece). Full netherite set ≈ 48% dodge chance against mobs
Deflects play a shield-clang sound + crit particles and cancel the hit entirely

**--Combat Enchants--**

- Charged (L1-3) - absorbs incoming damage as stored energy, release with G for a ranged shockwave. Includes a boss-bar-style HUD overlay
- Might (L1-5) - stacks melee damage up to +15 hearts across pieces, uses attribute modifiers
- Vampiric (L1-3) - heals a % of melee damage dealt back to you (capped at 100% lifesteal)
- Hot (L1) - burns anything touching you + auto-smelts ore drops nearby

**--Defensive Enchants--**

- Resistant (L1-5) - flat % damage reduction, L5 = full immunity above 50% durability, scales down past that
- Plating (L1-4) - stacks knockback resistance across pieces up to full immobility

**--Utility Enchants--**

- Feathery (L1-4) -  periodic hunger + saturation refill, emits a trail of real feather sprites (chestplate-only)
- Aquatic (L1-2) - water breathing + underwater mining speed; L2 adds Dolphin's Grace
- Momentum (L1-3) - permanent movement speed, stacks across all pieces
- Swift (L1-4) - boots-only speed matching vanilla Speed tiers
- Adrenaline (L1-5) - Regen + Speed when at or below 3 hearts
- Greed (L1-3) - multiplies mob drops up to 7× with full stacking + Reactor

**--Meta Enchant--**

- Reactor (L1-4) - gold-tooltip "Reactor-Powered" enchant that amplifies all other armor enchant effects by ×1.25 / 1.50 / 1.75 / 2.00

**--Curse Enchant--**

- Curse of Malice — armor slowly drains your life via magic damage that bypasses all resistance. Shows in red, will kill you if unequipped too late

Supports enchanting table and villagers.

**Made By MaceMeta**
